title: Bloom Skincare
description: A small-batch, natural skincare brand based in Melbourne. We managed a 15-creator seeding campaign and Meta ad funnel that delivered 2.6x ROAS from their first product launch.
results: 2.6x ROAS on Meta ads from launch
body:
## The Brief

Bloom Skincare is a two-person operation making natural, small-batch skincare products from a studio in Brunswick. They had a Shopify store but almost no traffic — and no idea how to launch on social.

## Our Approach

We ran a two-track launch. First, an influencer seeding campaign: 15 carefully selected nano creators (5K-30K followers) in the skincare and wellness space received product in exchange for honest reviews. Second, we built a Meta ads funnel using the UGC content these creators produced.

Michelle managed the ad creative testing — rotating through 12 different UGC clips to find the top performers, then scaling spend behind the winners.

## The Results

Bloom achieved 2.6x ROAS on Meta from their first month of paid activity. The seeding campaign drove 8,400 new Instagram followers in 10 weeks. Three creator posts went organically viral, generating earned media value that far exceeded the seeding cost.
